title: Nasi Lemak
description: Coconut milk-infused rice with spicy sambal and fragrant anchovies. A popular Malaysian dish.
instructions: Rinse the rice thoroughly and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
Drain and cook the rice with 2 cups of water in a saucepan.
In a separate pan, combine coconut milk, sambal, and sushi rice vinegar.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the coconut milk mixture and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in chopped cilantro and salt to taste.
Serve hot with fragrant anchovies and steamed vegetables on the side.
